IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Fortitude
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A sturdy rune that reinforces the structure of any armor, greatly increasing its durability.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Evasion
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A swift rune that makes the wearer lighter on their feet, improving dodge chance in melee.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Resistance
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A dense rune that hardens worn armor, absorbing a portion of all incoming damage.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Regeneration
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A pulsating green rune that hastens the natural healing of wounds.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Warding
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A calming rune that protects the wearer's mind, lowering their mental break threshold.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Vitality
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A warm rune that bolsters the body's defenses, speeding immunity development against disease.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Swiftness
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A light rune that enhances the wearer's agility, granting greater movement speed.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Bulwark
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A massive protective rune that greatly reduces all damage taken. Stacks with Resistance.
